title: On-device semantic search for the assistant
summary: Turn on Semantic search in the AI chat and the assistant finds context by meaning, not just matching words — fused with keyword search and your data's connections. It runs entirely on your device and is off by default.
highlights: Finds related notes even when they don't share the exact words you typed
Runs on-device — the model loads only when you opt in, and never leaves your machine
Always safe: falls back to keyword search instantly, so it can only help, never slow you down
